programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to stop embittered John Holliver from venting his wrath on the people who expelled him from town years before.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas becomes the target of a vengeful mountaineer after he is responsible for a young mountain boy's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark is kidnapped and held for ransom, he finds himself an unwilling companion of gunman Carl Avery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas seeks an escape when he's captured by outlaws while seeking help for an injured Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The young Queen-to-be of France hides out in North Fork with her sick brother.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A notorious killer is being held in the North Fork jail. When word gets around that Gordo's gang is on its way to free him, the whole town becomes frightened.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's old Army pal settles in North Fork with his deaf daughter.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Englishman arrives with a custom-made rifle and a plan to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark falls head-over-heels in puppy love.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Banker Hamilton is closing up for the day when Rudy Gray persuades him to stay open for one more transaction...a withdrawal at gunpoint.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Tip Corey, the son of a man allegedly murdered in North Fork, has a killer's reputation and comes to town to kill Micah.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Len Richards and his brother, Ab, confront a Lucas McCain look-alike, Earl Bantry and his sidekick K.C. Peters, for slaughtering one of Richards' steers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark stop on the way to the county fair to deliver a message to Micah, who is escorting a prisoner to be hanged. Mark and Lucas recognize the prisoner.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Milly are shocked when Lucas begins gambling. They don't know that Lucas is "undercover" trying to catch a man cheating.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark befriends singer-banjoist Lafayette Bly, a blind man with an acute sense of hearing and a very strong grip.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A retired lawman's irrational jealousy threatens not only to destroy his marriage but also to make him an easy target for someone who wants him dead.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: No one is more surprised than Micah when newcomer Leota Carraway claims he's her long-lost husband and the father of her child.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is torn by conflicting emotions when he meets the town's new preacher, a former outlaw whom the Rifleman vowed to kill.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The town of North Fork becomes a haven for outlaws when suave Ben Judson smooth-talks his way into the marshal's job.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome gambler moves into town and begins wooing Milly Scott, claiming to have known her deceased brother.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas develops temporary amnesia from a head injury while visiting a strange town and mistakenly assumes the identity of a wanted criminal.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former neighbor of the McCains' is released from jail after serving his sentence for robbery. Lucas lets the man work for him but the new hand holds a secret.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas, Mark, and Micah get lost in Old Mexico, they are held hostage by a group of bandits who intend to kill the men and take Mark as a slave.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While trapped in the ghost town saloon, Lucas tries to come up with a plan to escape with his son and Micah after Mark refuses to leave without him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lou Mallory arrives in North Fork and starts buying up land and businesses. Lou and Lucas start disliking each other after she reveals plans to build a railroad on "worthless" land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a woman arrives in North Fork with symptoms of smallpox, Lucas, Lou Mallory, Doctor Burrage, and hotel occupants are quarantined in the hotel with an outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gunslinger Johnny Drako rides into town and tells the bartender that he is looking for Lucas McCain. After Johnny leaves the saloon, Sweeney hurries to tell Lucas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In 1942, a German wonders why he's on the deck of a British steamship, with no memory of how he got there, and an overwhelming sense of impending doom.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts have returned from this first space flight. Major Gart is hospitalized with a broken leg. The other two, Colonels Harrington and Forbes head for a bar. Harrington gets a strange feeling…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A two-bit thug thinks he's found the key to a better life in an old sidewalk salesman who has the uncanny ability to tell people what they need the most.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man who can change his face to resemble others gets into hot water with gangsters.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: With all-out nuclear war about to ignite, a scientist and his pilot friend plot to escape on an experimental spaceship.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts crash on what they believe to be an asteroid. Unfortunately they have only limited water supplies to sustain them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Alone on a cross-country trip, a woman continually sees the same hitch-hiker everywhere she looks.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Tight fisted Franklin Gibbs is not pleased when his wife wins a trip for two to Las Vegas. But things change when he falls under the spell of a slot machine that calls his name.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A World War I flying ace flies through a mysterious cloud - and lands at a modern U.S. air base in the year 1959!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Lt. Fitzgerald has found his own special wartime hell. Looking into the faces of his men prior to battle, he has the disquieting ability to see who is about to die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts land on what looks like Earth 200 years before they left--only all of the people seem frozen in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Millicent Barnes sees her double at a bus terminal.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Paranoia strikes the residents of Maple Street when they believe human-looking aliens have invaded the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Businessman Arthur Curtis discovers that life as he knows it doesn't really exist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Walter Jameson is an excellent history teacher who talks about the past as if he had lived it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a space exploration crashes on Mars, the surviving passenger is surprised to find that Martians are human-looking, very friendly and apparently just like us...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Just before being hanged for shooting a man in the back, a man in 1880 is transported into the year 1959 by a professor who soon realizes that he has brought forward a savage killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An over-the-hill boxer gets a boost from one of his biggest fans - a little boy with an unwavering belief in magic.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After being shot to death, Rocky Valentine encounters the amiable white-haired Mr. Pip, who gives Rocky everything he wishes for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Schoolteacher Helen Foley finds a strange and very serious little girl on the stairs outside her apartment. The little girl seems to know her, and tries to jog her memory about a man she saw earlier that day. The man arrives at Helen's door…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Riding home on the train one day, a man falls asleep and dreams it is 1880, and he is entering a small town called Willoughby.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man, desperate to win the affection of a beautiful woman, slips her a love potion. He is overjoyed that the potion works so well...at first.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A trumpet player who's convinced he'll never amount to anything attempts suicide and finds himself in a world where no one can hear or see him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An eccentric loser gets a new life from his guardian angel, but there is a price to keeping it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A woman discovers that the floor of a department store, on which she bought a gold thimble, doesn't exist - and that her 'saleslady' is really a mannequin!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A scientist arranges to have his human-looking robot pitch for the struggling local baseball team.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A playwright makes characters come to life.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The threat of the Whisperers return leads to paranoia sweeping over Alexandria; in the meantime, Carol battles with the need for revenge.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Still-paranoid Alexandrians get riled up over the Whisperers and take their fear out on Negan; at Hilltop, the group deals with an unexpected safety issue.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Supplies go missing from Hilltop; Negan is idolized by an Alexandrian; Ezekiel holds a secret.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol and Daryl go on a mission together while Siddiq struggles to solve a mystery.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol pushes boundaries that make Daryl uncomfortable; Alpha and Beta have reservations about someone.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A fight causes tensions in Oceanside while the Alexandrians set out on a high-stakes mission.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group must figure out how to get out of a precarious situation.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group must defend Alexandria from a threatening outside force.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Whisperers are coming for Hilltop; after Daryl and Lydia's encounter with Alpha, the communities must decide whether to run or fight; Eugene's communication with Stephanie gets complicated.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne takes Virgil back to his mysterious island to reunite with his family; in exchange, Virgil promises weapons that could change the tide of the Whisperer War.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With Negan's help, Alpha and the Whisperers attack Hilltop.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Heroes and villains reckon with the aftermath of the Hilltop fire; Eugene takes a group on a journey to meet Stephanie, with the hopes of befriending another civilization.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The communities prepare for the final battle of the Whisperer War; meanwhile, Eugene's group encounters Princess.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Beta engages the final battle of the Whisperer War.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie returns, to the dismay of Negan; the trials she endured since leaving have made her harder in order for her and her son to survive; Daryl and Maggie unexpectedly fight an unseen and unknown threat.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol find an old cabin that takes Daryl back to his years away from the group after Rick disappeared; he relives the painful memory of meeting a reticent survivor and the toxic events that amplified his relationship with Dog.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo debe defender a Alexandria de una fuerza amenazante.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tras el encuentro de Daryl y Lydia con Alpha, los habitantes de las comunidades enfrentadas a los Susurradores, que se aproximan a la Cumbre, tienen dos opciones: huir o pelear. Entretanto, surgen problemas entre Eugene y Stephanie.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne lleva a Virgil de regreso a su misteriosa isla para reunirse con su familia. A cambio, Virgil promete armas que podrían cambiar el rumbo de la Guerra de los Susurradores.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne devuelve a Virgil a la isla misteriosa de la que proviene para que se reencuentre con su familia. A cambio, Virgil promete que le entregará un arsenal que cambiará el rumbo de la guerra contra los Susurradores.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Todos, héroes y villanos, se adaptan a las consecuencias del devastador incendio que destruyó la comunidad. Eugene encabeza a un grupo que parte en busca de Stephanie, guiados por la esperanza de encontrar otra civilización.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Princess asusta a los caballos de Eugene, Yumiko y Ezekiel, pero les promete otro medio de transporte. Mientras, Beta, en estado de delirio psicótico, guía a la horda de zombis hacia Alexandria para destruirlo todo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los seguidores de Beta se acercan a las puertas, y parte del grupo se impregna de sangre de zombi para intentar escapar entre la multitud de caminantes y regresar con ayuda. Sin embargo, los susurradores se mueven con cuchillos entre los zombis.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie regresa, para consternación de Negan. Los desafíos que superó desde su partida han hecho que se vuelva difícil sobrevivir para ella y su hijo. Por otro lado, Daryl y Maggie luchan inesperadamente contra una amenaza invisible y desconocida.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol encuentran una vieja cabaña que provoca que Daryl recuerde sus años alejado del grupo después de que Rick desapareció. Además, revive el doloroso recuerdo de encontrarse con un sobreviviente y los eventos tóxicos con Dog.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Gabriel y Aaron buscan comida y suministros para llevarlos de regreso a Alexandria, utilizando el mapa de Maggie. En su búsqueda de una ubicación más, encuentran un escondite, pero la fe se rompe y el optimismo se resquebraja.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene, Ezekiel, Yumiko y Princess son capturados y separados por los misteriosos soldados que los rodeaban en la estación ferroviaria. Princess lucha con los recuerdos de su traumático pasado y planea escapar.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Jim West and Artemus Gordon match wits with an arch-criminal of grandiose ambitions that plans to reclaim the empire of Mexico and establish himself as a new Napoleon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Four men, aided by a guard named Foxx, gain entrance to the U.S. Mint in Carson City and connect a hose to a street gaslight in order to asphyxiate three workers.

programme.desc: A man from the Attorney General's office in Washington is killed while attempting to take the wanted John Avery into custody, so secret agent James T.West is assigned to the task.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon determine to track down a missing Albanian princess when the regal young lady they have been guarding turns out to be an impostor.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Maros Antonio Barrera
programme.desc: On February 19th, 2000 Erik Morales fought Marco Antonio Barrera for WBC and WBO World Super Bantamweight titles at Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas which ended in a split decision victory for Morales.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Maros Antonio Barrera II

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Maros Antonio Barrera III

programme.title: Evander Holyfield vs Larry Holmes
programme.desc: On June 19th, 1992 Evander Holyfield battles Larry Holmes for the IBF, WBA, and WBC World Heavyweight title they battled at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas the bout went a full twelve rounds and ended in a unanimous decision win for Holyfield.

programme.title: Felix Trinidad vs Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: On September 18th, 1999 Felix Trinidad and Oscar De La Hoya faced eachother for the IBF and WBC World welterweight title at the Mandalay Bay Resort in Las Vegas that ended in a majority decision win for Trinidad.

programme.title: Floyd Mayeather vs Jose Luis Castillo 2
programme.desc: On December 7th, 2002 Floyd Mayweather faced Jose Luis Castillo for a second time at Mandalay Bay Resort & Casino in Las Vegas for WBC World lightweight titles resulting in a unamimous decision win for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather Jr vs Justin Juuko
programme.desc: On May 22nd, 1999 Floyd Mayweather fought Justin Juuko at the Mandalay Bay Resort & Casino in Las Vegas for the WBC World Super featherweight title with the bout ending in round nine resulting in a victory for Mayweather

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Arturo Gatti
programme.desc: On June 25th, 2005 Floyd Mayweather fought Arturo Gatti at the Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City for the WBC World Super Lightweight title with Gatti down in round 1 the fight ended in a victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Carlos Alberto Ramon Rios
programme.desc: On February 17th, 1999, Floyd Mayweather fought Carlos Rios for the WBC Super Featherweight Title in Grand Rapids, Michigan. Rios was a tough opponent for Mayweather, but Mayweather prevailed and showed out in front of his hometown, winning by UD.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Diego Corrales
programme.desc: On January 20th, 2001 Floyd Mayweather faced Diego Corrales in a battle for the WBC World super feather weight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas ending in a technical knockout victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Jose Luis Castillo 1
programme.desc: On April 20th, 2002 Floyd Mayweather fought Jose Luis Castillo for the first time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for WBC World lightweight titles in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs DeMarcus Corley
programme.desc: On February 26th, 2005 Miguel Cotto fought DeMarcus Corley for the WBO World Super Lightweight title at the Coliseo Ruben Rodriguez in Bayamon with Corley going down twice in the 5th round securing the technical knockout victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Hector Arroyo
programme.desc: On January 9th, 1998, Floyd Mayweather fought Hector Arroyo in a featherweight bout in Biloxi, Mississippi. A young Mayweather hungry for a title shot came out quick against Arroyo, stopping him in the fifth round of the fight.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Larry O'Shields
programme.desc: On June 14th, 1997, Floyd Mayweather fought Larry O'Shields in a lightweight bout at the Alamodome in San Antonio, Texas. A young Mayweather showed his impressive speed and agility, earning a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Manny Pacquiao
programme.desc: On May 2nd, 2015, Floyd Mayweather fought Manny Pacquiao in what was labeled as the "Fight of the Century." Floyd Mayweather emerged victorious via a unanimous decision, showcasing his exceptional defensive skills against Pacquiao's aggressive style.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Zab Judah
programme.desc: On April 8th, 2006, Floyd Mayweather fought Zab Judah for the IBF and IBO Welterweight Titles at Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. In a fight with a dramatic melee in round 10, Mayweather cruised in the later rounds to win by unanimous decision.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: With Korie still in Africa, Willie and Jep must step in and supervise Bella's sleepover. When a couple boys play a prank on the girls, Willie and Jep prove to be the perfect chaperones for the task.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Korie challenges Willie to come up with a romantic gesture without spending any money. Missy and Jase compete to see who can find a girlfriend for Mountain Man.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase's hopes to win the inaugural Duck Commander Fishing Tournament is buoyed when he is able to enlist the help of legendary angler Bill Dance. Meanwhile, Willie's vanity over his greying beard leads him to make a questionable decision.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase and Jep make a deal with Mia and Merritt to get them to go dove hunting with them. Si tries to make some extra cash by starting a West Monroe tour.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jumping Asian carp have invaded Monroe's waters so Jase and the guys set out to try to stop them from spreading further. Meanwhile, Willie and Si have to run Willie's Duck Diner for the day.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The family spends a weekend at their childhood summer camp, reliving old memories and working to repair a tennis court Willie built twenty years ago. While at the camp, Jep tries to pass a lifeguard swimming test he failed as a teenager.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The Ice Road Truckers battle across the continent over frozen lakes, rivers, and ocean. Alex heads farther north than ever before on the deadly Dempster.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Alex drives on the Arctic Ocean, to the northernmost Canadian village accessible by ice road. Hugh and Rick face melting ice in a desperate search for missing trailers.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: In Alaska, the clock is ticking on the Dalton as the deadline to deliver a massive oil rig pushes every driver to step it up to get the job done.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The biggest storm of the season hits the Haul Road. A trailer malfunction leaves Jack Jessee in danger of getting stranded as the brutal weather closes in.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: With the Dalton shut down, every haul road driver fights to make their delivery as the DOT scrambles to reopen the road.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Rowdy's adoption is finalized and he officially becomes a Robertson. Jase gets his first massage and enjoys it more than he expected.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: After Willie and Jase lose Si's teacup, Si makes them go to great lengths to find it. When the entertainment for Gus's 1st birthday party falls through, Jep fills in as a magician.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie, Korie, Jase, and Missy take dance lessons from Sadie to prepare for Reed and Rebecca's upcoming weddings. Jase's plan to perform Reed's wedding ceremony may fall through when he waits until the last minute to renew his ordainment.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Si decides to retire to pursue a music career, the family organizes a party in his honor. Meanwhile, Willie, Phil, and Jase take a road trip to try to recreate an old duck call for Si's retirement gift. (Surprise performance from ZZ Top!)

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertson family takes a look back at 130 episodes of Duck Dynasty

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Phil, Willie, and Ms. Kay attempt to produce a cooking video for their fans.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Phil decides to teach his grandkids the value of a hard day's work by building a football field and culminating in a family football game.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: After a big order comes in Willie pushes the Duck Commander team to meet the tight deadline, so Jase and the warehouse guys come up with a plan to build a conveyer belt.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As the Autobots watch over the powerful Negavator prototype weapon for the military, an attack, and accident leaves Red Alert malfunctioning and paranoid of his fellow Autobots. Confused, he strikes a partnership with the evil Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As the Autobots watch over the powerful Negavator prototype weapon for the military, an attack and accident leaves Red Alert malfunctioning and paranoid of his fellow Autobots. Confused, he strikes a partnership with the evil Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: The Maximals are infected with a virus that turns them against each other. Optimus has second thoughts about his plan for harmony.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: A seemingly empty spaceship crashes onto Cybertron. When Optimus re-formats the transformer she joins the Maximals. Her name is Botanica.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Exile is reintroduced after a mysterious time away. Is GiGi Gianni really ready to face a veteran opponent like the timeless Alpha Malia Hosaka all on her own?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Beast returns to the ring for the first time since her leg injury and leaves the audience in utter shock. After a run-in backstage, Leia Makoa and Tiki Chamorro have a score to settle with the Fabulous Four.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight marks the debut of a brand new WOW Superhero! Our very first Gen Z competitor - Jennifer Florez. Sahara Spars is eager to show she has what it takes to become the next top contender at WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With The Beast relinquishing her championship title due to injury, David McLane announces how WOW will determine the new World Champion.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The mother-daughter duo of Holly Swag and Big Rig Betty has everybody talking! Tonight they get a surprising shot at the WOW Tag Team Championships in the main event against Tag Team Champions Miami's Sweet Heat, Lindsey and Laurie Carlson.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight, The Tonga Twins seek to even the odds as they face Exodus and Genesis of Team Exile in the main event of WOW!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight, we learn if Leia Makoa can get a payback or will she take another beat down at the hands of Wrecking Ball. Will Lana Star's protege get the better of Stephy Slays? Or will Stephy's indomitable spirit win the day?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lana Star's privileged protege and member of the Fab 4, Penelope Pink must defeat the high flying Princess Aussie to secure a shot at the WOW Championship.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: WOW Superhero Kandi Krush wants revenge for her treasured boxing gloves, but is forced to make her way through a maze of freight, upheaval, and senaster mental torture to secure tonights long awaited revenge match against Chainsaw.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Robbie Rocket takes on Vivian Rivera while Gigi Gianni and Amber Rodriguez prepare to battle Jennifer Florez and Keta Rush in tag team action. Rapping sensation the quick lipped BK Rhythm battles crowd favorite Stephy Slay.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lana Star's Fabulous Four faction is taking over WOW but just what will that mean for the rest of the WOW roster? Can Tiki Chamorro defeat Exile's Genesis in a singles match as Exodus and Ice Cold stand ring side.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight's Main Event match is Coach Campanelli and Randi Rah Rah versus Miami's Sweet Heat in a rematch for the WOW Tag Team Championships! Will Sweet Heat retain?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Let's hope tonight's main event sticks to the rulebook as The Fabulous Four's Enforcer Vickie Lynn McCoy takes on the frog splashing Princess Aussie! We also see the in-person return of Angelica Dante, who we last saw in the attic of the House of Horrors.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The World's Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez, has a mysterious new tag team to introduce at WOW. Also in action today in what promises to be a hard-hitting, brawl of a match, Reina Del Rey and Wrecking Ball team up to take on The Heavy Metal Sisters.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh and the beautiful female prisoner he is transporting to trial are on a three-day trip while her partner is still on the loose in the area.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is on his way to River City to transport three convicts there to be hanged.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A journalist from Boston accompanies Josh on his manhunt to get an exclusive story on a bounty hunter as part of a series of articles.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh feels compelled to repay a debt to an old friend who's in jail and may hang.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings in outlaw Carlos Domingo but he has to be released when the witness against him is killed in front of Josh.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is sent for by Sheriff Mike Strata and the desperate men of Coronado.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings in a young man wanted for robbery but loses his reward and expenses.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh arrives in a town for rest and to gamble just as the local bank has been robbed.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A widow wants to hire/propose to Josh so she doesn't lose custody of her son.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A woman asks Josh, an old friend, to help find her husband Frank - a bounty hunter out to settle a score.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When Randall has a sheriff bed a prisoner, the man's gang kidnaps the sheriff and two others and threatens to kill one per day until the man is freed.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: In Mexico, Josh is hired to protect a sensible man and his pregnant wife from his father-in-law and the villagers who are angered when he refuses the town healing woman or \\"witch\\".

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: After Josh reluctantly takes the task of finding a man and his wife's pet ewe, he becomes the butt of many jokes in the community while cattlemen nearly hang him when he mentions sheep.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When a convicted killer escapes prison, Josh is hired for $500 to protect the woman whose testimony put him there.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides into a town looking for a man who asked him to come there for a job that pays $500.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is hired by Harry Weaver to track down his twin brother Pete, who's wanted with a $500 bounty on him.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is called in to track down a new outlaw - the local sheriff who is a friend.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh reluctantly takes a job protecting a beautiful deaf, mute, teenage girl and keeping everyone off the father's place for a day or two.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh escorts an East Coast photographer to take a picture of his friend El Gato (The Cat), who is a famous, hilarious bandit living in the hills of Mexico with a small army.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A broke Josh is hired by a fearful man to help him elope with his sweetheart, Jane, the daughter of a local rancher.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh takes a job for $200 protecting an express office employee who stole $10,000 and wants to return it before it's discovered missing.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A Japanese woman travels to the U.S. to find an American man who proposed to her in Japan and hires Josh to find him since no one will help her in her search.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh arrives in town thinking the sheriff summoned him to go after a man.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides to Barney Durant's horse business to rent a couple of horses right after Barney pushes his son David to leave.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: While pursuing Carl Martin, Josh stops at a marshal's office where Carl is being held.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When phony wanted posters put a price on the head of a retired Confederate officer, Colonel Sykes' daughter summons Josh Randall to help keep the bounty hunters at bay.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A reclusive old man with an Apache bodyguard is wanted for a crime committed long ago.
